name: Golden Egg Bread (Challa)
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Sugar                             ¾ cup Water; warm
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order listed and select white bread.
2. Push start.
3. When the machine stops, remove the dough from the breadmaker.
4. Let it rise.
5. Braide the dough in a flat manner (the middle piece goes under and over, never across).
6. Egg wash the challa.
7. Sprinkle with seeds (optional) such as sesame or poppy.
8. Bake at 350°F until lightly toasted brown.
